description: Default PR pipeline, run AFTER lavish approval and the operator choosing the PR path (see .claude/skills/change-review and pr-workflow). Two review passes (coldstart, then merge-gate), each followed by fix + tests, then PR creation. Override per repo by copying to config/pr-pipeline.<repo>.json. Add a gate by defining it in the pr-workflow skill and inserting its name here.

gates.note: fresh independent read of the diff against base
apply coldstart findings on the same branch
second independent review of the fixed tree; the merge gate
run only when the change has a security surface
open the PR with the branch convention and a short human description
